infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: BlackBox SOS needs your location to send it to emergency services in case of a crash.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: BlackBox SOS needs your location for crash reporting.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: BlackBox SOS uses motion sensors to detect crashes automatically.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: BlackBox SOS needs background location access to report your position in a crash.
